custom_fields.description:
Note: Supported file formats: .pdf, .mp3, .mp4, .wav, .m4a, .ogg
For .pdf – directly go to Evaluate Candidate
For audio file – click "Upload audio", then click the button to "Get Transcript"
custom_fields.label: Evaluate Candidate Details
custom_fields.name: Job Applicant-custom_evaluate_candidate_details

custom_fields.depends_on: eval:(doc.status == 'Screening Call- Rejected' || doc.status =='Client CV Screening- Rejected' || doc.status =='Rejected by Candidate')
custom_fields.label: Rejected Reason
custom_fields.mandatory_depends_on: eval:(doc.status == 'Screening Call- Rejected' || doc.status =='Client CV Screening- Rejected' || doc.status =='Rejected by Candidate')
custom_fields.name: Job Applicant-rejected_reason_cf
